title: Schneider Electric India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Schneider Electric India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
